metaTitle: The Founder — Godfrey O'Flaherty · Aligning Strategy
metaDescription: Godfrey O'Flaherty — nearly 30 years in complex turnarounds and growth transformations, applied in high-stakes, time-sensitive environments.

hero.heading: Godfrey O'Flaherty
hero.subtitle: Senior leadership partnership in moments that matter

portraitNote: Image placeholder — Godfrey's photo will be added here.
lead: Nearly 30 years in complex turnarounds and growth transformations. Godfrey helps executive teams make clean decisions inside messy reality — calm, rigorous systems thinking, and the facilitation of courageous conversations that unblock movement.

workCard.title: How he works
items: Diagnoses causality fast, without premature solutions.
Builds alignment through truth-telling and structured dialogue.
Moves teams from fear and politics to ownership and execution.
Brings specialist facilitators only where required.

learningCard.title: Learning organisation capability
learningCard.body: Implementation is supported by coaching and leadership development, embedding learning-organisation habits (Senge) so capability remains after the engagement ends.

proof.heading: Trusted in high-complexity, time-sensitive environments.
proof.lead: Applied across industries with real stakes — large workforces, large balance sheets, major deadlines, severe competitive pressure.
selectedItems: De Beers Large-scale mining implementation model, diamond industry.
Barclays / ABSA Support through major acquisition integration dynamics.
Major South African construction firms 12–18 month profitability restoration programs at scale.
Soccer City & Nelson Mandela Bay Stadium Full implementation under FIFA World Cup time constraints.
Aveng Group Resolution of severe financial stress in a major open-cast mining project.
proof.signalsBody: The common thread across these engagements is not an industry — it is the conditions under which the work was done.
